videos.headline: Missouri survives in 2OT on missed Vandy FG
videos.description: Missouri defeats Vanderbilt in double-overtime after the Vanderbilt kicker misses a field goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri survives in 2OT on missed Vandy FG) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia finds Joseph McVay for Vanderbilt TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia goes downfield and finds Joseph McVay for a 65-yard Vanderbilt touchdown vs. Missouri.
